OR select available UPI apps

column4: Verify Order Placement via Credit Card
column5:
1. Open the Flipkart application
2. Register and login with valid credentials
3.Select the product 
4.Click on the buy button
5.Navigate to the order summery page 
6.Check the delivery address,product and price details 
7.Click on continue button
8.Select the credit card option
9.Enter valid credit card details (card number, expiry date, CVV)
10.Complete the OTP verification
11.Click on Pay Now / Place Order
column6:
1.Order should be placed successfully
2.Order confirmation page should be displayed with Order ID
3.Confirmation message should be sent via SMS/Email
column7: Payment completed successfully, order confirmation page displayed with Order ID, and confirmation sent via SMS/Email

column4: Verify Order Placement via cash on delivery
column5:
1. Open the Flipkart application
2. Register and login with valid credentials
3.Select the product 
4.Click on the buy button
5.Navigate to the order summery page 
6.Check the delivery address,product and price details 
7.Click on continue button
8.Select Cash on Delivery option
9.Click on the place order button
column6:
1.Order should be placed successfully
2.Order confirmation page should be displayed with Order ID
column7: Order placed successfully and order confirmation page displayed

column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Login with valid credentials
3.Search and select any product
4.Add the product to cart
5.Click on Buy Now
6.Verify order summary details (address, price, product)
7.Click on Continue
8.Select any payment method (e.g., UPI / Card / Net Banking)
9.Enter invalid payment details OR simulate network failure
10.Click on Pay Now
column6: System should display “Payment failed, please try again” and user should remain on payment page
column7: System displayed “Payment failed, please try again” message and user remained on the payment page without placing the orde
